def negative_arbitrary_file_write_via_user_controlled_path():
    rule_id = "arbitrary_file_write_via_user_controlled_path"
    family = "boundaries"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "File write operation uses a path derived from user input without containment check."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
